title: Senior Software Engineer - Jio Platforms - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Jio Platforms - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jio Platforms family as a Senior Software Engineer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jio Platforms:
Jio Platforms is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms!
